prompt: Write a commit message - I added a new blog post about Astro tutorial

assertions.name: bilingual-format
assertions.description: Commit message has English Conventional Commits title and Chinese body
assertions.check: Title is English, body is Traditional Chinese

assertions.name: correct-type
assertions.description: Correctly categorizes change type (feat or docs)

assertions.name: meaningful-body
assertions.description: Body describes the new blog post in Chinese
assertions.check: Body contains Chinese description about the post topic
